revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-475

An antenna consisting of conductors in successive positions of the generator of a vertical cone; the upper ends, which are at the apex of the cone, are connected to a down lead which is often the supporting tower.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Umbrella antenna}}
